sourceMovie.title: Armor
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Armor for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a crime rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Justin Routt keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Gone in Sixty Seconds
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Armor clicked for you, Gone in Sixty Seconds (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Armor?
faq.answer: Try Gone in Sixty Seconds, Contraband, Street Kings—each shares DNA with Armor while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Armor?
faq.answer: Armor (2024) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Armor worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
